Home.heroTitle: Find your home in Douala and Yaoundé
Home.heroSubtitle: Thousands of verified rental and sale listings.
Home.ctaTitle: Do you have a property to rent or sell?
Home.ctaSubtitle: Post your listing for free and reach thousands of buyers and renters.

ContactPage.metaDescription: Contact the ImmoCM team by email or WhatsApp.
ContactPage.title: Contact
ContactPage.subtitle: A question, an issue with a listing? Write to us below or contact us directly on WhatsApp.

ContactForm.successToast: Your message has been sent. We'll get back to you shortly.

AboutPage.metaDescription: Discover ImmoCM's mission, the real estate listings platform in Cameroon.
AboutPage.title: About ImmoCM
AboutPage.paragraph1: ImmoCM is a Cameroonian real estate listings platform dedicated to the cities of Douala and Yaoundé. Our mission is to simplify the search for and publication of rental and sale listings, by directly connecting owners, agents, and tenants or buyers.
AboutPage.paragraph2: Every listing published on ImmoCM is reviewed by our team before going live, to guarantee the reliability of the information shown to visitors.
AboutPage.paragraph3: ImmoCM is free for agents and owners who want to post a listing, and free for visitors browsing listings.

LegalPage.metaDescription: Legal notice and privacy policy for ImmoCM.
LegalPage.title: Legal notice
LegalPage.publisherBody: ImmoCM is a real estate listings platform operating in Douala and Yaoundé, Cameroon.
LegalPage.termsBody: Using the ImmoCM website implies full and unconditional acceptance of these terms. Every listing published must correspond to a property that is actually available, with accurate information. ImmoCM reserves the right to refuse or remove any listing that does not comply with these terms.
LegalPage.privacyBody: Personal data collected (name, phone number, email) is used solely to connect listers with visitors, and is never resold to third parties.

errors.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.passwordComplexity: Password must contain at least one letter and one digit

RegisterPage.title: Create an account
RegisterPage.subtitle: Sign up to publish your listings on ImmoCM.
RegisterPage.successBody: A verification email has been sent to your address. Click the link in it to activate your account.
RegisterPage.errorToast: Something went wrong. Please try again.

LoginPage.title: Log in
LoginPage.subtitle: Log in to your ImmoCM account.

VerifyEmailPage.successBody: Your email address has been verified. You can now log in.
VerifyEmailPage.errorBody: This verification link is no longer valid. You can request a new verification email.
VerifyEmailPage.resendSuccess: A new verification email has been sent.
VerifyEmailPage.resendError: Could not send the email. Please try again.

ForgotPasswordPage.title: Forgot password
ForgotPasswordPage.subtitle: Enter your email address to receive a reset link.
ForgotPasswordPage.confirmationMessage: If an account exists with this email, a reset link has been sent.

ResetPasswordPage.title: Reset password
ResetPasswordPage.subtitle: Choose a new password.
ResetPasswordPage.successToast: Password reset. You can now log in.
ResetPasswordPage.invalidTokenBody: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
